wallpapers.description: A container for wallpaper entries, where keys are unique identifiers.

description.description: A brief textual description of the wallpaper. Can be null.

category.description: The classification or genre of the wallpaper content.

refs.description: A list of reference URLs related to the image.

source.description: The origin or platform where the wallpaper was found.

ratio.description: The aspect ratio calculated as width divided by height.

file_type.description: The MIME type of the file.

file_size.description: The size of the file in bytes.

url.description: The direct link to the full-size image file.

hash.description: The cryptographic checksum for file integrity verification.
